name: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad
motto: Inventing and Innovating in Technology for Humanity
logoDescription: Designed by Dr. D. Udaya Kumar (IIT Guwahati): two stylised letter “i”s share a common dot and form an “H”, beneath a sun symbolising knowledge, growth and creation.
colorsNote: IIT Hyderabad publishes its logo colours in CMYK only; any hex values used on this site are unofficial sRGB approximations.
affiliation: RAFT is hosted by the Department of Civil Engineering, IIT Hyderabad.
